name: op-flow
description: Operator development pipeline — declarative phase definitions

phases.name: Design Document
phases.description: DOCS/operators/<op>.md must exist with formula derivation
phases.on_fail: Create DOCS/operators/${OP_NAME}.md with: math formulas, SPAD layout, instruction mapping, FormulaLogger coverage. See 01_cholesky_noblock_v2.md for template.

phases.name: Mathematical Derivation
phases.description: Document must contain formula derivation and optimization equivalence proof
phases.check: grep -q '公式推导' DOCS/operators/${OP_NAME}.md || grep -q 'formula' DOCS/operators/${OP_NAME}.md
phases.on_fail: Add '## 2. 公式推导' section with baseline formulas and optimization equivalence proof.

phases.name: Code Follows v3.0 Standard
phases.check: grep -q 'base_addr = 0' src/inverse/${ALGO_DIR}/${OP_FILE}.cc && grep -q 'set_algorithm' src/inverse/${ALGO_DIR}/${OP_FILE}.cc && grep -q 'PIPE_BARRIER' src/inverse/${ALGO_DIR}/${OP_FILE}.cc
phases.on_fail: Fix: base_addr=0 in MOVIN, FormulaLogger::set_algorithm(), PIPE_BARRIER at column boundaries.

phases.name: Build Verification
phases.check: CMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM=3.5 cmake --build build --target Simulator -j$(nproc) 2>&1 | grep -q 'Built target Simulator'

phases.name: Runtime Smoke Test
phases.check: ONNXIM_MAX_CORE_CYCLES=100000 ./build/bin/Simulator --config configs/ascend_910b_quiet.json --models_list example/${CONFIG_JSON} --mode ${MODE} --log_level info 2>&1 | grep -q 'finish at'
phases.on_fail: Check for SPAD deadlock, missing init, wrong addresses.

phases.name: Audit Sub-Agent Review
phases.description: /audit-operator must pass — sub-agent compares formulas in doc against code
phases.action: Invoke /audit-operator ${OP_NAME}. All checklist items must PASS.

phases.name: Benchmark & Archive
phases.description: Run benchmark and store to results/<op>/run_NNN/

phases.name: EXTENSION: Numerical SE Verification
phases.description: [FUTURE] Verify numerical correctness via FormulaLogger→UOBS SE reconstruction
phases.action: Run scripts/verify_baseline.py with operator output and compare SE

phases.name: EXTENSION TEST: SPAD Layout Audit
phases.description: Verify SPAD addresses don't overlap and all regions are sized correctly
phases.on_fail: SPAD layout may have issues — check for overlapping regions.
